suggested_actions: Check dual-track extraction logic in industry_logic/

skipped.reason: STT lacks granular STB components, forcing DebtCurrent fallback ($12.2B). yfinance uses narrower Current Debt definition (~$9.8B). $2.4B difference is repos/fed funds that yfinance excludes. Definition mismatch, not extraction bug.

YFinance annual data (~$7.6B) differs significantly from quarterly (~$15B). Our 10-K extraction is consistent with quarterly. This is a yfinance data quality issue - their annual aggregation doesn't match their quarterly reports.

YFinance annual data (~$7.6B) differs significantly from quarterly (~$15B). Our 10-K extraction is consistent with quarterly. This is a yfinance data quality issue - their annual aggregation doesn't match their quarterly reports.

10-K uses Bottom-Up (CP + FHLB + OtherSTB + CPLTD = $20.8B). yfinance likely uses STB - Repos without CPLTD (~$13.6B). Methodological difference, not extraction bug. 10-Q passes perfectly (-0.9% variance).

10-K uses Bottom-Up (CP + FHLB + OtherSTB + CPLTD = $20.8B). yfinance likely uses STB - Repos without CPLTD (~$13.6B). Methodological difference, not extraction bug. 10-Q passes perfectly (-0.9% variance).
